positive: A mystical, whimsical forest scene illustration featuring a stylized, bioluminescent owl perched on a twisting branch, surrounded by glowing flora and delicate magical energy swirls. The style is sophisticated flat vector illustration with deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) mixed with pops of neon cyan light. Emphasize clean, high-contrast silhouettes and symmetrical composition, perfect for central apparel print placement. The atmosphere is serene and magical, with visible star-like particle effects and gentle fog creeping across the forest floor. Detailed clean lines, solid color blocking, tattoo art aesthetic, no photo realism.
negative: photorealism, blur, noise, artifact, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, messy, grainy, dirty
